notes: CLR event (not routed) but universally available on every FrameworkElement — belongs in shared bucket.
Routed; also toggles IsTapEnabled and IsTabStop on FrameworkElement when handler attached.
CLR event on ToggleSwitch only. User handler is held by the element (ToggleSwitchElement.OnToggled / OnIsOnChanged), not by Current* field.
Single trampoline shared across all ButtonBase subclasses. User handler held by the element.
Distinct from ScrollViewer — ScrollView is the newer WinAppSDK control with TypedEventHandler<ScrollView, object> signature.
Bool sentinel — not a trampoline. Tracks whether NumberBox's inner TextBox has been re-wired to forward inner-text changes for immediate-mode validation.
